The '''''Cannibal''''' was [[Barosa Warren]]'s personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] while he was the manager of the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]].

==Characteristics==
The ship derived its name because its construction cannibalized parts of other ships, commonly incompatible parts. The main parts came from almost thirty different manufacturers; the manufacturers of the minor parts were countless. The hull itself combined those of a [[Kuat Systems Engineering/Legends|Kuat Systems Engineering]] [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|''Firespray''-class patrol and attack craft]] and a [[Ckratar Crafts]] [[Venturer-class freighter|''Venturer''-class freighter]]. The power converters had been stolen from [[Koensayr Manufacturing/Legends|Koensayr Manufacturing]], the primary sensor array was from [[Primarin Starshipwrights Union]], and the two flight computers came from a [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttle]].

==History==
Warren obtained the ship or its part as a payment from a student who had a talent for ship design and repairs, but not for finances. He quickly became the personal owner of the ship with his friend [[Casti Tholon]] as first officer.
